stages_per_round.name: Choice Filling
stages_per_round.description: Candidates exercise their preferred choices of colleges and branches in priority order. Order matters; any number of choices can be added.

stages_per_round.name: Allotment
stages_per_round.description: Seats are allotted based on rank, community, choice order, and seat availability.

stages_per_round.name: Confirmation of Allotment
stages_per_round.description: Candidate must confirm the allotted seat by selecting one of six options. Non-confirmation leads to loss of seat and movement to the next round.

stages_per_round.name: Reporting & Fee Payment
stages_per_round.description: Reporting to the allotted college (Accept and Join) or to the nearest TFC (Accept and Upward / Decline and Upward) and paying the necessary fees.

confirmation_options.title: Accept and Join
confirmation_options.description: Satisfied with the allotment. Download the provisional allotment order and report to the college on or before the date specified for admission. Non-reporting or non-payment cancels the allotment.

confirmation_options.title: Accept and Upward
confirmation_options.short: Lock the seat, wait for a better choice
confirmation_options.description: Satisfied with the allotment but want to wait for a higher-priority choice in the upward movement. Report to the nearest TFC, pay fees, and the previous allotment is confirmed if no better choice opens up.

confirmation_options.title: Decline and Upward
confirmation_options.short: Drop this seat, wait for a higher choice
confirmation_options.description: Not satisfied with the allotment. Decline it, but wait for a higher-priority choice in upward movement. If none opens, you move to the next round.

confirmation_options.title: Decline and Move to Next Round
confirmation_options.short: Drop this seat, try the next round
confirmation_options.description: Not satisfied with the allotment and not interested in upward movement either. Decline and participate in the next counselling round.

confirmation_options.title: Decline and Quit
confirmation_options.description: Not satisfied with the allotment and do not wish to continue in any subsequent round. You exit the counselling process.

confirmation_options.title: Upward or Move to Next Round
confirmation_options.short: Try upward movement, then next round
confirmation_options.description: Shown when no seat is allotted based on your choices. Opt for upward movement; if a seat opens up it is allotted, otherwise you move to the next round.

notes: Special reservation counselling (Differently Abled, Ex-Servicemen wards, Sports Persons) is conducted first, followed by general and 7.5% government-school counselling running simultaneously online.
Candidates eligible for 7.5% government-school quota, First Graduate scholarship, or PMSS must report to college / TFC but do not need to pay fees.
Seats of candidates who do not report to college (non-joined) and seats of candidates who do not pay at TFC (non-paid) are pooled as vacant seats for the next round and upward movement.
The residual seat matrix at the end of each round becomes the input for the next round.
